title: Luffy Stumbles into Nami’s Plan
description: On pages 11–14, this part develops the danger of Buggy’s crew and the unstable alliance between Luffy, Zoro, and Nami.
scene: Orange Town becomes the stage for Nami’s schemes, Buggy’s violence, and Luffy’s refusal to act like a normal pirate.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: AND TAKE EVERYTHING OF VALUE FROM THIS TOWN!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So you lost your crew at sea?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just one other guy, is this your house?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No. My work keeps me on the move. I don't know whose house it is.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: THE TOWN IS PRACTI- CALLY DESERTED.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Everyone wants to stay as far from the tavern as possible that's where buggy and his pirates are.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ARE NAM AND HIS MEN REALLY THAT SCARY?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: DON'T MIX ME UP WITH HIM!

summary: The Orange Town conflict mixes Nami’s suspicious cleverness with Buggy’s theatrical cruelty. The section builds the unstable alliance that will oppose Buggy’s crew.
